text.title: Error-Tracker to Draft-PR Pipeline Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: wire-webhook
step.action: Add webhook to agent endpoint; payload includes 5 structured keys.

step.name: configure-thresholds
step.action: Set event_count_min + fixability_score_min based on triage capacity.

step.name: patch-and-test
step.action: Agent proposes patch + regression test; runs focused tests.

step.name: open-draft-pr
step.action: Open draft PR linked to alert; CODEOWNERS routes review; PR template enforces test presence.
